mapper.insert: INSERT INTO certificate (certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status) VALUES (#{certificateNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{orderId}, #{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{petName}, #{ownerName}, #{graduateDate}, #{issueDate}, #{templateId}, #{certificateUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status, create_time FROM certificate WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status, create_time FROM certificate WHERE certificate_no = #{certificateNo}

SELECT id, certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status, create_time FROM certificate WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status, create_time FROM certificate WHERE order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT id, certificate_no, user_id, pet_id, order_id, course_id, course_name, pet_name, owner_name, graduate_date, issue_date, template_id, certificate_url, status, create_time FROM certificate ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE certificate SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM certificate WHERE id IN
#{id}
